description: Bun cha la mot mon an cua Viet Nam, bao gom bun, cha thit lon nuong tren than hoa va bat nuoc mam chua cay man ngot. Bun cha co net tuong tu mon bun thit nuong o mien Trung va mien Nam, nhung nuoc mam pha co vi thanh nhe hon. Bun cha is a Vietnamese dish of grilled pork and noodle, which is thought to have originated from Hanoi, Vietnam. Bun cha is served with grilled pork (cha) over a plate of white rice noodle (bun) and herbs with a side dish of dipping sauce.
